## Type

- [ ] Checklist improvement
- [ ] Revision mode issue
- [ ] Review mode issue
- [ ] Install or compatibility issue
- [ ] Documentation issue

## Description

Describe the issue or proposed improvement.

## Example

If relevant, include the prompt, input text, and output behavior. Remove private or unpublished manuscript content before posting.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what the skill should do instead.

## Verification

List any sources, citations, or local validation steps that support the request.
